title: psychotria serpens var. parvula
intro: Psychotria serpens var. parvula is a variety of the Psychotria serpens plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is commonly known for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory agent, and has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues, due to its rich content of alkaloids and flavonoids. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
